validate.notes: Docker build passes. NOP test correctly fails with reward=0. Gold test correctly passes with reward=1. Rubric judge returns 0.0 due to fundamental incompatibility: judge runs git diff on host filesystem (/workspace/task/environment) which is not a git repo (repo is inside Docker container). Rubric rules expect config file edits but gold modifies only code files - no config hunks to compare.
